prototypeToken.name: Ariandel The Fleet-Footed, AKA  Aria Tellemet

information.notes:
Ariandel is a solo who started her career as an Elflines cosplayer. She's finding success in time with the game's rise in popularity, though she isn't necessarily pleased with her persona being tied to the game's success. She's also become increasingly tired of the cosmetics required to maintain her look, and a visit to the Zoo (Biotechnica's exotic biosculpting camp) might be in order, soon.

Ariandel still plays the game, but has shifted her focus to mercwork, embracing her persona to become a cool, efficient and fleet-footed thief. More personally, she keeps a cool face during conventions (which she is often paid to attend), but has come to dislike the game's other players. Having taken her persona and made it her life, she's disillusioned with them, viewing them as wasting their lives and without ambition.

Difficulty: Medium. Requires some tactical thinking.

Style of Play: Faux charm, sleight of hand, key shots, stealth and right place//right time.

Character Goals: Establish yourself independently of Elflines. Find a life outside of cosplay. Continue to upgrade your prized bow. Acquire some "genuine" elven high fashion clothing. Completely disassociate with past life & family, or reconnect with them.

Cyberware to Aspire To: Cyberlegs for agility. Neural Link + Smart Link for a smart bow. Neural Link + Chipware Socket + Tactile Boost for stealth activity. Speedware of choice.

In-Character Voice & Acting Inspiration: Sastsuki Kiryuin, Kill La Kill; Aria T'Loak, Mass Effect.

Local Expert: University District

Martial Art: Taekwondo (see CORE p. 181)

Techhair: Silky white and straight.

Chemskin: Flawless, pale complexion that doesn't blemish or burn.

All edgerunners included within NCG&C are wholly original, made to be played out of the box, and created using the "Complete Package" rules found in RED's Core Rulebook.

lifepath.culturalOrigin: North American; Pacific coast native with a love of the wilderness, Biotechnica-enhanced or not.
lifepath.personality: Cold, aloof, elite, slow to trust, but fiercely loyal to those she finds worthy of her friendship.
lifepath.clothingStyle: Asia Pop, Urban Flash & High Fashion if possible; intricate, well-maintained clothing of an elven ranger.
lifepath.hairStyle: Silvery blonde, straight, runs to below her shoulders.
lifepath.affectations: Starburst glass necklace with internal glow; limited edition "rare drop" from Elflines.
lifepath.valueMost: My image; I've worked hard to build it.
lifepath.valuedPerson: Myself; just looking out for #1, because no one else will.
lifepath.valuedPossession: My bow - hand crafted by an elusive tech specializing in turning fiction into reality.
lifepath.familyBackground: Grew up in a family of corporate managers in the Northwest Free States. Loving dad, absentee mom, hence the somewhat... er... "masculine" approach to life.
lifepath.childhoodEnvironment: Corporate suburbs - I had everything but freedom.
lifepath.familyCrisis: My family was downsized as part of a merger; I left my dad behind when I moved out.
lifepath.lifeGoals: Detach my persona from Elflines, and outlive the game towards which I've become so resentful.
lifepath.friends: None ot speak of, but also the entire community of Elflines.
lifepath.tragicLoveAffairs: You ever tried finding a date as a famous cosplayer? The pool isn't great to begin with and only goes downhill from there.
